title: Libraton Wood Chisel Set - 4PCs Professional Carpenter Chisels for Woodworking With Wooden Handle
features: 【Professional Woodworking Chisel Set】Libraton chisels sets includes 4 pieces well-made wood chisel with walnut handles: 6mm, 12mm, 18mm, 25mm. Wood chisels are of bevel edge for woodworking carving multi-purpose use, suitable for all soft wood, hard wood and laminated wood products.
【Premium Material】The woodworking chisels blades are made of chrome vanadium steel (Cr-V steel) with hardness of HRC60±2, added strength. Chisels set is of high hardness.
【Comfortable Wooden Handle】The woodworking chisel is of ergonomically design of hardwood walnut handle, which let you can pound on it with a hammer without damaging it.
【Stylish Pouch Storage】All chisels woodworking are packed in a cowhide pouch, each tool fits snugly into its respective place to prevent moving around and scraping, protect blade properly.

【Wide Application & Guarantee】 The wood chisel set is suitable for both professional woodworking or carpenter job. As it is with a pouch, the woodworking chisel set is also a great gift. We provide a 12-month guarantee for this chisel set, OUR SERVICE TEMA CAN RESPONSE YOUR MESSAGE WITHIN 24H to help you solve any problem.
description: Product Description Libraton Chisels Set 4PCS What Libraton Wood Chisel Set can do for your woodworking? Cutting: Cutting is a general term that refers to any removal of woodfrom a workpiece. Chopping: Chopping is when you use the chisel to remove chunks of woodby cutting down into a piece of timber and then cutting across. Paring: It is often used in conjunction with chisels where light andintricate woodworking is needed like removing material for a hinge joint,sculpting, or finishing. Scraping: scrape off unwanted coatings like glue or paint from asurface, remove small amounts of wood. Finely Manufactured Woodworking Chisels Wooden Handle *The handle is made of hard wood, which gives it a wonderful feeling when using, light and glossy, suitable for long hours of work. *It has excellent shock absorption when hit by a hammer, which can protect your hands well. Sharp Blade *The blade is made of chrome vanadium (HRC60), of good hardness and toughness, dramatically extending the service life of high carbon steel. *The 25 ° sharp bevel edge enhances sharpness and can be used directly without sharpening. Steel End Cap *A steel ring is attached to the rear end of the handle so that it can be protected well and has excellent durability and impact resistance. Premium Accessories Safety Protection Cap *For users' safety and the protection for blades, each chisel comes with a safety cap. Luxury Pouch *Wood chisels set can stored separately in a pouch, clearly marked, easily to be used according to the situation. *The pouch is made of high quality material and has a high-class texture, giving it a good touch feeling. Easy to Carry *This chisels set is a perfect gift for family and friends.
